mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_posts WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM forum_posts WHERE author_username = #{authorUsername} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT p.* FROM forum_posts p WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (#{keyword} IS NULL OR MATCH(p.title, p.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) AND (#{tag} IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM forum_post_tags fpt INNER JOIN forum_tags t ON fpt.tag_id = t.id WHERE fpt.post_id = p.id AND LOWER(t.name) = LOWER(#{tag}) )) AND (#{job} IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM forum_post_tags fpt_job INNER JOIN forum_tags t_job ON fpt_job.tag_id = t_job.id WHERE fpt_job.post_id = p.id AND LOWER(t_job.name) = LOWER(#{job}) )) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_posts (title, content, author_username, author_display_name, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, created_at, updated_at, published_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorUsername}, #{authorDisplayName}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{publishedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_posts SET title=#{title}, content=#{content}, status=#{status}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE forum_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_posts SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_posts SET like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_posts SET comment_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_comments WHERE post_id = #{id}) WHERE id = #{id}
